case_title: BRANDON JONES ET AL VS. ANYA WASKO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. 2 PLAINTIFFS ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
